description_long: This is a tall, rectangular filing cabinet with a dark wood or laminate finish and a modern, minimalist design. The front features two large doors with a subtle vertical seam and a small, central handle, while the back and sides are plain and unadorned. The rear view reveals two drawers at the top, each with a round knob and a visible key lock, and a pair of lower doors with smaller knobs, suggesting multiple storage compartments. The cabinet stands on small, barely visible feet, elevating it slightly off the ground. The overall construction appears sturdy, with a smooth, hard surface and a sleek, professional appearance. This type of cabinet is commonly found in offices or urban workspaces for secure document storage.
description: A tall, dark wood filing cabinet with two front doors and multiple drawers, featuring a sleek, modern design and secure locks.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large, light-colored doors with a central seam and a small handle.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, dark wood panel with no visible handles or features.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing two drawers with round knobs and locks, plus two lower doors with smaller knobs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, also plain and dark, matching the other side panel.
